stem: The lengths of the three sides of a triangle are p, q, and r. The triangle has a perimeter of 31 units. If p = 12 units and q = 8 units, what is the value of r, in units?
rationale: Choice D is correct. The perimeter is the sum of the three side lengths, so p + q + r = 31. Substituting p = 12 and q = 8 gives 12 + 8 + r = 31, so r = 11.
